race.comment: Tough race but sticking with SASS (6) who is in fine form. Runner-up behind Rock Revolution last time who is in the first race so will quickly see the strength of that form. Has the pace to be handy and expected to go close. ANKLE ROLEX (5) has been racing over the sharper journeys but has a good record over the mile and should be at top now. Major player on best figures. DESERT MIST (2) was solid fresh but will be fitter and extra trip suits. Strong record course and distance and can improve sharply. ITWASONLYAKISS (1) is a former Victorian fitter for four runs for the new yard and is drawn for a soft run. Gets a chance to fire. I'M A DREAMER (8) has a good record course and distance and both runs this time in have been sound.
